notes: Perforated armor plate — steel with regular hole pattern that disrupts projectiles by yaw induction or shear. Effective RHAe ~0.55-0.65 vs AP (60% of solid plate weight). Used in IDF armor upgrades, vehicle skirts. Effective against small arms and fragments; less so against APFSDS. Areal density ~20-35% lower than solid plate of same ballistic resistance.

source.reference: IDF armor research, open-source ballistic evaluations
source.methodology: RHAe estimated from geometric fill ratio and published IDF test data on perforated armor (RHAe ~60% of solid plate at ~70% weight). Density adjusted for hole pattern.
